title: Notification No.81/2010-Cus(NT),dt. 9.9.2010
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 81 / 2010-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 9th September, 2010. S.O .... (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Additional Commissioner of Customs (Imports), Air Cargo Complex, Ahmedabad to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on:- ( i) the Additional Commissioner of Customs, ( Imports), Air Cargo Complex, Sahar, Mumbai ; and (ii) the Additional Commissioner of Customs (Import), New Customs House , Mumbai, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to Show Cause Notice pertaining to M/s United Agency,Shravan Bunglow, judge's Bunglow Road, Behind Simandhar Towers, Opposite Ambience Apartments, Bodakdev, Ahmedabad and others, issued vide, F.No DRI/MZU/ B/Enq-23/05-16 dated the 23rd May, 2007 by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intellgence, Zonal Unit, Mumbai. [F.No. 437/33/2010-Cus.IV] (Navraj Goyal) Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 1 of 1 --
